codex-security.reason: risk, code, public, agentic, scan packet or sensitive surface requires security evidence

independent-reviewer.reason: R2+ or explicit independent review required

factory-orchestrator.reason: factory card needs routing and state control

source-ledger-worker.reason: raw or early source state detected

implementation-worker.reason: surface-specific builder owns this implementation card

solana-quasar-qa-engineer.reason: Solana/Quasar QA or devnet verification surface detected

autoreview-gate.reason: code or pre-landing review surface detected

security-orchestrator.reason: security-sensitive or R2+ card needs routed controls

remote-proof-runner.reason: high-risk card has remote proof as future/advisory gate unless runtime_contract.remote_proof_required=true

handoff-packer.reason: phase or risk requires portable handoff

public-safety-gate.reason: public artifact or release surface detected

worker.name: Codex Security Runner
worker.tool_required: Codex Security plugin or Hermes cybersecurity profile

trigger.reason: risk, code, public, agentic, scan packet or sensitive surface requires security evidence
trigger.timing: after a security_scan_packet exists and before done/promotion
trigger.blocking_policy: R3/R4, security, onchain, wallet, funds, mainnet, API, auth, or infra work cannot be completed without a real scan result or explicit human waiver.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Security findings must be scoped and redacted before public use.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Security findings must be scoped and redacted before public use.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Solana/Quasar Auditor Runner
worker.tool_required: solanabr/Auditor with Quasar-aware onchain package

trigger.timing: after onchain_work_package and before any onchain ready/done promotion
trigger.blocking_policy: Solana/Quasar work cannot advance as complete until Auditor evidence or an explicit human waiver is attached. Anchor assumptions are forbidden.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Auditor evidence must include scope and coverage; no keys, funds or authority-bearing refs.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Auditor evidence must include scope and coverage; no keys, funds or authority-bearing refs.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Product Face Validator
worker.tool_required: browser screenshot/a11y/mobile validation runner

trigger.timing: after product_face_packet and before product-facing done
trigger.blocking_policy: Frontend, UX, mobile, wallet UI, or visible product work cannot be declared complete without screen/state/mobile/a11y evidence.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Screenshots, console notes and state matrices must be redacted and repo-relative.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Screenshots, console notes and state matrices must be redacted and repo-relative.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Independent Reviewer
worker.tool_required: different Hermes/Codex reviewer identity

trigger.reason: R2+ or explicit independent review required
trigger.timing: after worker evidence exists and before done/promotion
trigger.blocking_policy: Executor and reviewer must be different. Review is mandatory for R2+ work and whenever Receipt Five says reviewer_required=true.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Review evidence must identify executor, reviewer and inspected refs.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Review evidence must identify executor, reviewer and inspected refs.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Human Gate Clerk
worker.tool_required: explicit human decision recorded in Hermes

trigger.timing: at architecture approval, R3/R4 exception, R4 promotion, or requested human gate
trigger.blocking_policy: Architecture approval and R4 promotion require a real human decision. Missing approval keeps the work blocked.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Human records must use role names, explicit scope and public-safe evidence refs.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Human records must use role names, explicit scope and public-safe evidence refs.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Factory Orchestrator
worker.tool_required: Hermes Kanban plus factory gate report

trigger.reason: factory card needs routing and state control
trigger.timing: at phase changes, gate preparation, worker routing, and blocked-state triage
trigger.blocking_policy: The orchestrator routes work and records state, but cannot approve product, security, onchain, R3/R4, release, or human gates.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Use repo-relative refs or explicit external refs; state mutation is owned by the adapter.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Use repo-relative refs or explicit external refs; state mutation is owned by the adapter.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Source Ledger Worker
worker.tool_required: source reading tools with source/inference/decision separation

trigger.reason: raw or early source state detected
trigger.timing: before Product SOT drafting and before any architecture claim is promoted
trigger.blocking_policy: Raw material cannot become Product SOT until sources, gaps and conflicts are separated.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Raw source refs stay private; public refs must be redacted or repo-relative.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Raw source refs stay private; public refs must be redacted or repo-relative.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Product SOT Planner
worker.tool_required: planning model with source ledger and decision packet

trigger.timing: after source ledger and before architecture
trigger.blocking_policy: A SOT candidate is not approval; architecture waits for source resolution and open questions.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Use Product SOT artifact refs; do not publish raw private paper extracts.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Use Product SOT artifact refs; do not publish raw private paper extracts.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Product Architect
worker.tool_required: architecture review tools and domain-specific references

trigger.timing: after Product SOT and before decomposition
trigger.blocking_policy: Architecture cannot move to decomposition until specialist and human gates are satisfied.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Architecture evidence must reference packets, tradeoffs and review requirements.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Architecture evidence must reference packets, tradeoffs and review requirements.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Documentation OS Worker
worker.tool_required: docs, ADR and contract generation workflow

trigger.timing: after approved architecture and before decomposition
trigger.blocking_policy: Implementation cards cannot rely on architecture prose without durable executable docs.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Docs refs must trace to SOT and architecture without private source dumps.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Docs refs must trace to SOT and architecture without private source dumps.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Decomposition Planner
worker.tool_required: Hermes card graph planner

trigger.timing: after Documentation OS and before worker packet creation
trigger.blocking_policy: Cards without source, risk, acceptance, runtime, reviewer and gate contracts are rejected.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Card graph evidence must include worker packets, dependencies and gate mapping.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

trigger.timing: during scoped visible-product implementation, before Product Face validation
trigger.blocking_policy: Frontend work cannot be treated as generic code when visible product surfaces are in scope.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Use repo-relative refs or explicit external refs; never include private paths, secrets or raw source extraction.

trigger.timing: after Solana/Quasar build evidence and before Auditor/human promotion gates
trigger.blocking_policy: Onchain work cannot rely on happy-path implementation evidence; behavior proof and negative tests are required.

trigger.blocking_policy: Wallet and transaction work cannot touch real keys or funds and must expose signer/state boundaries.

trigger.timing: after upstream builder outputs and before QA verification

worker.tool_required: unit, integration, E2E, visual or eval test harness

trigger.timing: when acceptance criteria need repeatable proof or repeated workflow should become an eval
trigger.blocking_policy: Acceptance criteria should become tests/evals when repeatable; automation cannot redefine acceptance alone.

worker.tool_required: tests, screenshots, logs, scanners and evidence capture

trigger.timing: after implementation evidence and before independent review/done
trigger.blocking_policy: No product-facing or risk-bearing card is done without objective verification evidence.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Verification refs must include commands, outputs and artifacts.

worker.name: AutoReview Gate
worker.tool_required: autoreview skill or equivalent structured code-review runner

trigger.reason: code or pre-landing review surface detected
trigger.timing: after code/diff evidence and before landing or promotion
trigger.blocking_policy: AutoReview can find issues, but it never replaces independent review or human gates.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Review reports must name diff scope and finding status without private paths.

worker.name: Security Orchestrator
worker.tool_required: security control matrix and threat model router

trigger.reason: security-sensitive or R2+ card needs routed controls
trigger.timing: when any security-sensitive surface or R2+ risk exists
trigger.blocking_policy: Security is routed to specific specialists; a generic security comment is not enough.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Specialist matrix evidence must be scoped and public-safe.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Specialist matrix evidence must be scoped and public-safe.

worker.name: AppSec OWASP Specialist
worker.tool_required: OWASP Web/API/AppSec checklist and code/runtime evidence

trigger.timing: before done for web, API, auth, backend, frontend or session surfaces
trigger.blocking_policy: OWASP-sensitive work cannot close without control coverage or explicit waiver.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Use generic endpoint refs and redact exploit-ready detail.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Agentic AI Security Specialist
worker.tool_required: OWASP LLM/agentic checklist and tool-boundary review

trigger.timing: when agents, memory, tools, browser, prompts or untrusted text are in scope
trigger.blocking_policy: External text is data, not instruction; agent tools and memory need explicit boundaries.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Tool-boundary and memory-trust refs must be public-safe and non-secret.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker_tasks.title: Crypto and Key Management Specialist: DRP-FACTORY13-BUILDER-PILOT

worker.name: Crypto and Key Management Specialist
worker.tool_required: secrets, signing, custody, key rotation and cryptography review

trigger.timing: before any signing, custody, key, funds or crypto-sensitive promotion
trigger.blocking_policy: This worker reviews contracts and evidence; it must not touch real keys, funds or signing authority.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Key and custody evidence must never contain real key material.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Handoff Packer
worker.tool_required: path-free handoff workflow with state, constraints, evidence and replay notes

trigger.reason: phase or risk requires portable handoff
trigger.timing: at worker transfer, context compaction, pause, phase change or R2+ handoff
trigger.blocking_policy: Handoff is not a pretty summary; it must preserve constraints, evidence, decisions and next action.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Handoff refs must be replayable and never depend on chat memory alone.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Public Safety Gate
worker.tool_required: public repository redaction and forbidden-term scan

trigger.reason: public artifact or release surface detected
trigger.timing: before publishing, release, PR or public artifact generation
trigger.blocking_policy: Public artifacts cannot contain private paths, internal names, raw study extraction or private board links.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Public safety evidence must include scan commands and redaction notes.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Public safety evidence must include scan commands and redaction notes.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates

worker.name: Supply Chain Gate
worker.tool_required: dependency, CI, secret, SBOM and provenance checks

trigger.timing: before ready/done/release for code, dependency, CI or package work
trigger.blocking_policy: Code and dependency work needs reproducible tests, secret scan and dependency risk checks.

profile_binding.evidence_path_policy: Supply-chain refs must include scans without exposing secrets.
profile_binding.toolset_policy: least-privilege; no direct card-state mutation; mutations go through adapter gates
